sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Gal omlo Jesuh ang sung, kham khut tawh hong kawi ding,
Hong itna a liim beel leng, ka lungsim
nuamsa ding.
Ngai un, vantung mi aw in, A vangtang vantungah;
Mual tung, tuipi tal panin, la sa
bang hong tunga.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Gal omlo Jesuh ang sung, Kham khut tawh hong kawi ding;
Hong
itna a liim beel leng, Ka lungsim nuamsa ding.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Gal omlo Jesuh ang sung, gimna tawlna
beina,
Leitung ze-etna khialhna’n, Hong zolzo nawn lo ding.
Lungkiatna le dahnate, kihtakn
zong dai hi;
Leitungah khitui luanna, neukha bek om lai hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka bukna Jesuh suangpi,
kei tang ding hong si pa,
Tua khang suangpi ka bel a, ka muang tawntung ding hi.
Zan khuamial hun
bei mateng,
Hiah ka ngak hithiat hi;
Kham khua a hong vak mateng, lungdamin ka ngak hi.
